name: useIntersectionObserver
description: Hook that gives you intersection observer state
examples: const { ref, entries, observer } = useIntersectionObserver(() => console.log('callback'));

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: The target element to detect intersection

source.source: * @param {HookTarget} target The target element to detect intersection
